metadata.description: AI-assisted SDLC plugin marketplace: Jira -> code -> verify -> Playwright -> Jenkins -> merge.

plugins.name: ai-sdlc
plugins.description: Drives a Jira issue to a merged PR: generate code, verify the app runs, generate Playwright E2E, run the automation on Jenkins, and merge to main once the report is green. Commands: /sdlc:intake, /sdlc:implement, /sdlc:verify, /sdlc:automate, /sdlc:run-ci, /sdlc:ship, /sdlc:run.
